# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the purpose of this PR in 2-4 lines.

## Changes

- Change 1
- Change 2

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore

## Validation

- [ ] npm run lint
- [ ] npm run build
- [ ] Manual test completed (backend/mock mode)

## Screenshots (if UI changes)

Before/after screenshots or short video.

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project conventions
- [ ] Docs updated (if needed)
- [ ] No sensitive data included

Closes #
